# Download the project

To find the project's code, navigate to its repository on GitHub: 
https://github.com/arthur-shaw/lsms2_dms.

To get the project's code on your device, follow these simple steps:

there are a two approaches, from simplest to most sophisticated:

- Navigate to the repository: https://github.com/arthur-shaw/lsms2_dms
- Click on the `Code` button
- Select `Download zip` and download
- Unzip the project on your device
